productDisplayName: Puma Men White Contest Hi Shoes
description: Style NoteSporty shoes from puma such as the Contest Hi are always a welcomed addition to your shoe collection. Styled and designed for great comfort and durability, you can take these shoes out on a run or for a comfortable day out.  Product DetailsRound blunt toed, high top shoe with lace up styling Nubuck overlay and form stripes on the side of the midfoot region Padded inner lining and a padded tongue Perforations on the toe box and midfoot region Rubber midsole with Puma branding TPU outsole with deep grooves, Puma branding and pivot points Material and CareRubber, syntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
